decisions.summary: Waive security-boundary blocker as a false-positive axis activation for this UI/UX style preset gate change.
decisions.reason: The changed files do not alter auth, permission, secret handling, sandboxing, path access, network access, or trust boundaries. The security axis was activated by broad docs/spec path signals, while the actual implementation surface is style preset selection, design-system artifact writing, and style-token drift validation. Current HEAD evidence covers the real failure modes through DS validate style-token drift/no-drift checks and broad regression; no security-boundary negative path is applicable to this diff.

decisions.summary: Security-boundary axis is a false positive for this change.
decisions.reason: The diff adds UI/UX style preset resolution, design-system artifact generation, style-token drift validation, CLI help/option wiring, docs, and tests. It does not alter auth, permission, secret handling, sandbox, path access, network, or trust boundary behavior. Negative-path coverage is represented by style-token drift/no-drift tests and DS secret scan for the actual touched surface, not by security-boundary tests.
